task_updates.executor_notes: Ran the project's existing test entrypoint with `npm test`, which executes `check:no-smoke-tests` and the full Vitest suite. The run completed with repo-wide failures outside the video-editor refactor surface: 25 failed suites / 52 failed tests / 824 passed suites. The failures were concentrated in unrelated areas such as missing imports (`src/moduleImportCoverage.test.ts`, `src/shared/editMedia/navigation.test.ts`, `src/shared/components/__tests__/HoverScrubVideo.test.tsx`, `src/shared/components/__tests__/LineageGifModal.test.tsx`, `src/shared/components/ui/touchableTooltip.test.tsx`, `src/shared/hooks/__tests__/useResources.test.ts`, `src/shared/hooks/projects/services/projectSetupRepository.test.ts`, `src/shared/hooks/projects/services/projectSetupService.test.ts`) and expectation mismatches in shared/integrations/character-animate/image-editing/travel-between-images tests. No new video-editor regressions were surfaced by this batch. Per the final-verification requirement, reran a throwaway pinned-group repro script against `buildDataFromCurrentRegistry`, `moveGroup`, `resizeGroupEdge`, and `replaceGroupChildren`; it passed and was deleted.
